blocks.text: Task DB plane adapts the local `riido-task-db.v1` file into agentbridge control-plane ports.

items: `internal/taskdb` owns schema, guarded mutation, command-id idempotent replay, and validation evidence receipts.
`internal/agentbridge/controlplane/taskdbplane` owns runtime registry and lease sidecars.
Lease ID, fencing token, and capability fingerprint are required to report terminal task state.
